regulatory_rules.rule: No growth language in adult food
regulatory_rules.description: The word 'growth' in an adult dog food violates AAFCO life stage definitions. Growth is reserved for puppy formulas. Adult food must use 'adult maintenance' language.
Cannot claim 'natural' alongside synthetic artificial colours or preservatives without a qualifying disclaimer.
IAMS has documented basis for vet recommendation claim. Pedigree does not — this claim must not appear on Pedigree listings.

regulatory_rules.rule: No misleading omission of controversial ingredients
regulatory_rules.description: Content must not be misleading about ingredient composition. Controversial ingredients present in formula (BHA, artificial colours) must not be concealed by content claiming only natural ingredients.
